reasons: The current selected loop-through candidate remains wp-agent-registry-follow-up while future-selection criteria are now modeled explicitly.

The criteria cover repo-local preference, governance-safe preference, draft/review-only posture, validation gate requirement, human decision gate requirement, no unauthorized docs/jai mutation, and no authority expansion.
The criteria are surfaced compactly across root, work, deliberation, and the passalong block without adding routing state or persistence.
